name: phoenix-drive
description: Premium secure file sharing portal written in Next.js & Express

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && PORT=5000 node src/index.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && PORT=5000 node src/index.js" "cd frontend && npm start"

author: Soumyajit
